raw_consumer_statement:
I am writing to file a formal complaint against Citibank regarding the handling and denial of my fraud claim. I believe my case was mishandled and that Citi 's decision to deny the claim, despite compelling evidence, is unjust. 

The issue began with several unauthorized charges on my Citi card on XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX. I immediately reported these transactions as fraudulent. After an initial review, my claim was denied. A representative informed me that the denial was based on the purchases being made with the card 's chip. 

I must state that I did not make or authorize these transactions. My physical Citi card was in my possession at all times, and I was not present at the locations where the charges occurred. These purchases do not match my typical spending habits. 

During a recent phone call with a Citi representative, a critical discrepancy was identified that further proves my case. While my physical card has an expiration date of XX/XX/XXXX, the bank 's system shows an expiration date of XX/XX/XXXX for these fraudulent transactions. This detail strongly indicates that a counterfeit or compromised card number, and not my physical card, was used. 

Furthermore, I am concerned about the lack of communication from Citi. I never received any written or electronic notification that my dispute had been declined. I only learned of the denial when I proactively called to check on the case 's status, which has caused unnecessary delays and frustration. 

I have been a Citi customer in good standing for many years and have never filed a fraud dispute before. I am requesting that the CFPB investigate this matter and compel Citibank to : Reinvestigate my fraud claim, taking into account the critical evidence of the expiration date discrepancy. 

Reverse the disputed charges in full and remove all associated interest and fees. 

Restore my account to its prior standing with no negative credit impact. 

Thank you for your time and for the vital service you provide to consumers. I can provide any additional documentation, such as travel records or receipts, as needed. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX XXXX
